channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Peter Navarro tells Newsmax communism and socialism have never succeeded
item.description: White House trade adviser Peter Navarro said on Monday that far-left lawmakers must be opposed.

item.title: James Talarico may face a challenge with Black voters; can he overcome it?
Homan tells Newsmax an ICE surge operation is coming to New York
item.description: Border czar Tom Homan said on Monday that limited state cooperation has led to a new immigration enforcement surge in New York.

item.title: Majority Leader Thune will not endorse in South Carolina Senate race
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune announced Monday he will not back a candidate in the race to succeed the late Sen. Lindsey Graham.
